793.title: Streaming responses missing cache_creation TTL breakdown (ephemeral_5m/1h_input_tokens)
793.reason: Clear reproduction given; 1 reaction; streaming beta usage response missing cache_creation.ephemeral_5m/1h_input_tokens fields that are present in non-streaming. Fix PR #1048 pending. Added as KI 1.

pr-1040.title: fix(helpers): give a clear error when a zod v3 schema is passed to the zod helpers
pr-1040.reason: PR fixing confusing crash when zodOutputFormat/betaZodTool used with zod v3; added auto-correction rule 7 to rules/messages-api.md.

pr-1050.title: fix(client): default redirect to manual to avoid forwarding non-standard headers
pr-1050.reason: Security edge case affecting custom baseURL + untrusted proxy redirect scenarios only. No user-filed issue; fix PR open. Low general user impact.

pr-1049.title: fix(stream): detect mixed newline SSE boundaries
pr-1049.reason: Internal SSE parser fix for mixed \n\r\n boundaries; no user-filed issue and low observed impact in practice.
